scripts.ci:local: pnpm install && pnpm audit --audit-level=high --prod && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run format:check && pnpm run lint && pnpm run build && pnpm run test:all
scripts.build: pnpm build:core && pnpm build:cli && pnpm build:extension
scripts.test: pnpm run test:unit && pnpm run test:integration
scripts.test:unit: pnpm --filter hydra-lens-core run test -- .unit.test.ts && pnpm --filter hydra-lens-extension run test -- .unit.test.ts && pnpm --filter hydra-lens-cli run test -- .unit.test.ts
scripts.test:integration: pnpm --filter hydra-lens-core run test -- .integration.test.ts && pnpm --filter hydra-lens-extension run test -- .integration.test.ts && pnpm --filter hydra-lens-cli run test -- .integration.test.ts
scripts.test:fuzz: pnpm --filter hydra-lens-core run test -- .fuzz.test.ts && pnpm --filter hydra-lens-cli run test -- .fuzz.test.ts
scripts.test:all: pnpm run test:unit && pnpm run test:integration && pnpm run test:security && pnpm run test:e2e:cli && pnpm run test:e2e:extension && pnpm run test:system
scripts.test:insane: pnpm run test:all && pnpm run test:fuzz && pnpm run test:bench && pnpm run test:mutate
